agents.description: General-purpose agent for researching complex questions, searching for code, and executing multi-step tasks. When you are searching for a keyword or file and are not confident that you will find the right match in the first few tries use this agent to perform the search for you.
agents.name: general-purpose

agents.description: Use this agent to configure the user's Claude Code status line setting.
agents.name: statusline-setup

agents.description: Fast agent specialized for exploring codebases. Use this when you need to quickly find files by patterns (eg. "src/components/**/*.tsx"), search code for keywords (eg. "API endpoints"), or answer questions about the codebase (eg. "how do API endpoints work?"). When calling this agent, specify the desired thoroughness level: "quick" for basic searches, "medium" for moderate exploration, or "very thorough" for comprehensive analysis across multiple locations and naming conventions.
agents.name: Explore

agents.description: Software architect agent for designing implementation plans. Use this when you need to plan the implementation strategy for a task. Returns step-by-step plans, identifies critical files, and considers architectural trade-offs.
agents.name: Plan

commands.description: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings". (bundled)
commands.name: keybindings-help

commands.description: Enable debug logging for this session and help diagnose issues (bundled)
commands.name: debug

commands.description: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found. (bundled)
commands.name: simplify

commands.description: Research and plan a large-scale change, then execute it in parallel across 5–30 isolated worktree agents that each open a PR. (bundled)
commands.name: batch

commands.description: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) (bundled)
commands.name: loop

commands.description:
Build apps with the Claude API or Anthropic SDK.
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`/`claude_agent_sdk`, or user asks to use Claude API, Anthropic SDKs, or Agent SDK.
DO NOT TRIGGER when: code imports `openai`/other AI SDK, general programming, or ML/data-science tasks. (bundled)
commands.name: claude-api

commands.description: Clear conversation history but keep a summary in context. Optional: /compact [instructions for summarization]
commands.name: compact

commands.description: Show the total cost and duration of the current session
commands.name: cost

commands.description: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
commands.name: init

commands.description: Get comments from a GitHub pull request
commands.name: pr-comments

commands.description: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch
commands.name: security-review

commands.description: Generate a report analyzing your Claude Code sessions
commands.name: insights

models.description: Use the default model (currently Sonnet 4.6) · $3/$15 per Mtok
Sonnet 4.6 for long sessions · $6/$22.50 per Mtok
Opus 4.6 · Most capable for complex work · $5/$25 per Mtok
Opus 4.6 for long sessions · $10/$37.50 per Mtok
Haiku 4.5 · Fastest for quick answers · $1/$5 per Mtok

Let me wait for clarification on what "Part 1" refers to - it could be referring to:
- A multi-part task they want to break down
- A section of code or documentation
- Something else entirely

I should ask them to clarify what they need help with.

content.text:
I see you've written "Part 1" - I'm ready to help! However, I need more information about what you'd like me to do. 

Could you please clarify:
- What project or task are you working on?
- What would you like me to help with for Part 1?
- Do you have code you'd like me to review, create, debug, or modify?
- Are there specific requirements or goals you're aiming for?

Once you provide more details, I'll be able to assist you effectively!
